select a.itype,
 a.dtstatdate,
 datediff(b.dtstatdate,a.dtstatdate) as idaynum,
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) as iusernum
from (
 select
 itype,
 min(dtstatdate) as dtstatdate,
 vplayerid
 from (
 select 'domain_term_4b98916e48' as itype,
 min(dtstatdate) as dtstatdate,
 vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240723' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240723',6)
 and submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20230804' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20230804',6)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_100fc8d11e%'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20241115' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20241115',6)
 and modename='domain_term_685408e56a' and submodename='domain_term_bbc4d7382e'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_a6d916673e', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240903' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240903',6)
 and modename='domain_term_68f20c1125' and submodename in ('domain_term_a6d916673e','domain_term_5443d2c237')
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_3098f333a6', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20241010' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20241010',6)
 and modename='domain_term_68f20c1125' and submodename like '%domain_term_3098f333a6%'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_6331c570b6', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240625' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240625',6)
 and modename='domain_term_685408e56a' and submodename like '%domain_term_6331c570b6%'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_a5f3fabe36', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240517' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240517',6)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_a5f3fabe36%'
 group by vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_54c5ed97f1', min(dtstatdate), vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240412' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240412',6)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_54c5ed97f1%'
 group by vplayerid
 ) t
 group by itype, vplayerid
) a
left join (
 select 'domain_term_4b98916e48' as itype, dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240723' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240723',13)
 and submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20230804' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20230804',13)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_100fc8d11e%'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20241115' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20241115',13)
 and modename='domain_term_685408e56a' and submodename='domain_term_bbc4d7382e'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_a6d916673e', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240903' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240903',13)
 and modename='domain_term_68f20c1125' and submodename in ('domain_term_a6d916673e','domain_term_5443d2c237')
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_3098f333a6', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20241010' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20241010',13)
 and modename='domain_term_68f20c1125' and submodename like '%domain_term_3098f333a6%'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_6331c570b6', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240625' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240625',13)
 and modename='domain_term_685408e56a' and submodename like '%domain_term_6331c570b6%'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_a5f3fabe36', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240517' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240517',13)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_a5f3fabe36%'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid

 union all
 select 'domain_term_54c5ed97f1', dtstatdate, vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where dtstatdate >= '20240412' and dtstatdate <= date_add('20240412',13)
 and modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' and submodename like '%domain_term_54c5ed97f1%'
 group by dtstatdate, vplayerid
) b
 on a.itype = b.itype
and a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
where datediff(b.dtstatdate,a.dtstatdate) between 0 and 7
group by a.itype, a.dtstatdate, datediff(b.dtstatdate,a.dtstatdate);

#answer:
#reason: The user intends to calculate first-week retention for specified game modes. Retention is defined as users who played the mode on their first day (within the mode's launch week) and again on subsequent days (0=same day up to7). The SQL uses subquery a to get each user's first play date in the mode's launch week, subquery b to get all their play dates for the mode (covering launch week plus next7 days), joins them to compute retention days, filters to valid retention days (0-7), and aggregates retained users per mode, first play date, and retention day.
#columns: dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.dtstatdate, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.vplayerid, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.modename, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.submodename

#SELECT: a.itype, a.dtstatdate, datediff(b.dtstatdate,a.dtstatdate), count(distinct a.vplayerid)
#SQL-like: For each mode (using modename/submodename conditions), get users' first play date in the mode's launch week; get all their play dates for the mode (launch week + next7 days); join on mode and user; compute days between first play and each play date; filter to days0-7; group by mode, first play date, retention day; count distinct users
divide: 1. Divide and Conquer:Main Question: Statistic the retention situation of each gameplay mode in the first week of its launch.Analysis: The question requires calculating the retention rate for specific gameplay modes ('domain_term_4b98916e48', 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0', 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e', etc.) based on users who first played these modes during their specific launch weeks. The output needs to show the mode name, the date the user first played (within the first week), the retention day index (0 to 7), and the number of retained users. Pseudo SQL: SELECT 'T1'.'itype', 'T1'.'dtstatdate', datediff('T2'.'dtstatdate', 'T1'.'dtstatdate'), count(distinct 'T1'.'vplayerid') FROM Cohort_Data AS 'T1' LEFT JOIN Activity_Data AS 'T2' ON ... GROUP BY ... Sub-question 1: Identify the cohort of users for each gameplay mode who played for the first time during the mode's launch week. Analysis: We need to query the dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di table. For each mode, we filter records within its specific launch week (Launch Date to Launch Date + 6 days) using dtstatdate. We identify the mode using modename and submodename as per domain knowledge (e.g., 'domain_term_4b98916e48' corresponds to submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191'). We group by vplayerid to find the min(dtstatdate) for each user, establishing their cohort date. Pseudo SQL: SELECT 'itype', min('dtstatdate') as 'dtstatdate', 'vplayerid' FROM (SELECT 'domain_term_4b98916e48' as 'itype', 'dtstatdate', 'vplayerid' FROM 'dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di' WHERE 'dtstatdate' BETWEEN '20240723' AND date_add('20240723', 6) AND 'submodename' = 'domain_term_289f963191' UNION ALL SELECT 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0' ... WHERE 'dtstatdate' BETWEEN '20230804' AND date_add('20230804', 6) AND 'modename'='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' AND 'submodename' LIKE '%domain_term_100fc8d11e%' ... (Repeat for all modes)) t GROUP BY 'itype', 'vplayerid' Sub-question 2: Track the daily activity of these users in the corresponding modes for the retention period (Launch Date to Launch Date + 13 days). Analysis: To calculate up to 7-day retention for a user who might have started on day 6 of the launch week, we need activity data for up to 13 days from the launch date. We query dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di again with the extended date range and the same mode filters. Pseudo SQL: SELECT 'domain_term_4b98916e48' as 'itype', 'dtstatdate', 'vplayerid' FROM 'dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di' WHERE 'dtstatdate' BETWEEN '20240723' AND date_add('20240723', 13) AND 'submodename' = 'domain_term_289f963191' GROUP BY 'dtstatdate', 'vplayerid' UNION ALL ... (Repeat for all modes) 2. Assembling SQL: Sub-question 1 (Cohort Definition): SQL: The derived table a in the final SQL aggregates the first play date (min(dtstatdate)) for each user within the launch week for each mode. Sub-question 2 (Activity Tracking): SQL: The derived table b in the final SQL retrieves all active dates for the users in the specific modes over the extended period. sql:
select
 s1.trigger_count as `trigger_count`, -- domain_term_dae828fe4fxdomain_term_1ebe5ba991
 count(distinct s1.vplayerid) as `trigger_user_cnt`, -- domain_term_4b32dfa436
 sum(s2.draw_count) as `total_draw_count` -- domain_term_8903640f0f
from (
 select
 vplayerid,
 dteventtime,
 coalesce(lead(dteventtime) over (partition by vplayerid order by dteventtime), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') as next_dteventtime,
 row_number() over (partition by vplayerid order by dteventtime) as trigger_count
 from (
 select distinct
 vplayerid,
 dteventtime
 from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi
 where tdbank_imp_date >= '2025011100'
 and tdbank_imp_date <= '2025012423'
 and actid = 2411070621
 and acttype = 10062
 and recodtype in ('1', '2')
 and strarg1 <> '0'
 ) ff1
) s1
join (
 select
 vplayerid,
 dteventtime,
 sum(arg1) as draw_count
 from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi -- actgeneralflowdomain_term_6a954390e3
 where tdbank_imp_date >= "2025011100" and tdbank_imp_date <= "2025012423" -- domain_term_2666aee5fb：20250111-20250124
 and actid = 2411070621
 and acttype = 10062
 and recodtype in ("1", "2")
 group by vplayerid, dteventtime


) s2
on s1.vplayerid = s2.vplayerid and s2. dteventtime >= s1.dteventtime and s2.dteventtime < s1.next_dteventtime
group by s1.trigger_count

Prepare storage: Set up temporary storage for intermediate results of trigger events (s1) and draw counts (s2). Open the table: Open the dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi table (activity record hourly increment table) for reading. ** Retrieving Trigger Events (Subquery s1):** Start scanning the table: Read rows from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi. Filter by date range: Keep rows where tdbank_imp_date is between '2025011100' and '2025012423'. Filter by activity identifiers: Select rows where actid is 2411070621 ('domain_term_878c817524' activity) and acttype is 10062. Filter by record type: Keep rows where recodtype is '1' or '2'. Filter for triggers: Select rows where strarg1 is not '0' (identifying events that triggered a gift/giveaway). Partition and Sort: Group the data by vplayerid and order by dteventtime. Calculate Window Functions: Compute trigger_count using row_number() to determine if it's the 1st, 2nd, etc. trigger for the user. Compute next_dteventtime using lead() to identify the end time of the current trigger's validity window (defaulting to '9999-12-31 23:59:59' for the last event). Store result: Save this dataset as s1. ** Retrieving Draw Activity (Subquery s2):** Start scanning the table: Read rows from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi again. Apply base filters: Apply the same filters for tdbank_imp_date, actid (2411070621), acttype (10062), and recodtype ('1', '2'). Note: Do not filter by strarg1 here, as we need all draw events. Aggregate draw counts: Group by vplayerid and dteventtime, then calculate sum(arg1) to get draw_count (the number of draws in that event). Store result: Save this dataset as s2. ** Linking Triggers to Draws:** Join datasets: Perform an Inner Join between s1 (triggers) and s2 (draws) on vplayerid. Filter by time window: Keep joined rows where the draw time (s2.dteventtime) is greater than or equal to the trigger time (s1.dteventtime) and strictly less than the next trigger time (s1.next_dteventtime). This attributes subsequent draws to the specific trigger instance. ** Aggregating Final Statistics:** Group by trigger sequence: Group the linked results by s1.trigger_count (e.g., 1st trigger, 2nd trigger). Count users: Calculate trigger_user_cnt by counting distinct s1.vplayerid. Sum draws: Calculate total_draw_count by summing s2.draw_count. ** Delivering the Result:** Output the result: Display the final trigger_count, trigger_user_cnt, and total_draw_count. End the process: Stop the query execution. Setup phase: The system identifies specific values like '20250111-20250124' (time range) and '2411070621' (Phantom Messenger activity ID) before execution. Final Optimized SQL Query: select s1.trigger_count as `trigger_count`, -- domain_term_dae828fe4fxdomain_term_1ebe5ba991 count(distinct s1.vplayerid) as `trigger_user_cnt`, -- domain_term_4b32dfa436 sum(s2.draw_count) as `total_draw_count` -- domain_term_8903640f0f from ( select vplayerid, dteventtime, coalesce(lead(dteventtime) over (partition by vplayerid order by dteventtime), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') as next_dteventtime, row_number() over (partition by vplayerid order by dteventtime) as trigger_count from ( select distinct vplayerid, dteventtime from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi where tdbank_imp_date >= '2025011100' and tdbank_imp_date <= '2025012423' and actid = 2411070621 and acttype = 10062 and recodtype in ('1', '2') and strarg1 <> '0' ) ff1 ) s1 join ( select vplayerid, dteventtime, sum(arg1) as draw_count from dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi -- actgeneralflowdomain_term_6a954390e3 where tdbank_imp_date >= '2025011100' and tdbank_imp_date <= '2025012423' -- domain_term_2666aee5fb：20250111-20250124 and actid = 2411070621 and acttype = 10062 and recodtype in ('1', '2') group by vplayerid, dteventtime ) s2 on s1.vplayerid = s2.vplayerid and s2. dteventtime >= s1.dteventtime and s2.dteventtime < s1.next_dteventtime group by s1.trigger_count

#answer:
#reason: The user wants to count, for the 20250111-20250124 interval, the number of users who triggered the X-th gift in the Fantasy Messenger event and their total lottery counts. The SQL uses two subqueries: one to identify each user's X-th gift trigger (with next trigger time) and another to compute lottery counts per user/time. Joining these gives lottery counts between triggers, then aggregating by trigger count yields the result.
#columns: dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.tdbank_imp_date, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.actid, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.acttype, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.recodtype, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.strarg1, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.vplayerid, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.dteventtime, dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.arg1
#values: Fantasy Messenger event refers to dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.actid = '2411070621' AND dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.acttype = '10062'; triggered gift refers to dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.strarg1 <> '0'; lotterydomain_term_d4a97e7577 refers to dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.arg1; time interval (20250111-20250124) refers to dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.tdbank_imp_date >= '2025011100' AND dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.tdbank_imp_date <= '2025012423'; recodtype filter refers to dwd_jordass_activityrecord_hi.recodtype IN ('1','2')
#SELECT: trigger_count, count(distinct vplayerid), sum(draw_count)
#SQL-like: 1. Filter events for Fantasy Messenger (actid=2411070621, acttype=10062), triggered gift (strarg1<>0), recodtype in (1,2), time interval; assign X-th trigger to each user. 2. Filter same events, sum lottery counts (arg1) per user/time. 3. Join triggers with lottery events (same user, lottery time between current and next trigger). 4. Group by trigger count to get user count and total lottery counts.

 else 'domain_term_9464b2154c'
 end

 union all

 'domain_term_96bfff66c5' as modename,
 vplayerid,

 where tdbank_imp_date between '2024061800' and '2025033023'

)

select a.mons,
 a.imodename,
 a.iusernum,
 b.iusernumall
from (
 select mons,
 imodename,
 count(vplayerid) iusernum
 from (
 select mons, vplayerid, imodename
 from (
 select mons,
 vplayerid,
 imodename,
 roundtime,
 row_number() over (partition by mons, vplayerid order by roundtime desc) as rn
 from main_user
 )ff1
 where rn = 1
 )f1

) a
left join (
 select mons,
 imodename,
 count(vplayerid) iusernumall
 from main_user
 group by mons, imodename
) b
on a.imodename = b.imodename and a.mons = b.mons
order by a.mons, a.imodename
;

sql:
select
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) as total_players,
 count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is not null then a.vplayerid end) as existing_players,
 count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is null then a.vplayerid end) as new_players
from (
 select vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di
 where dtstatdate between '20241214' and '20241220'
 and imode = 1344338933661592832
 and platid = 255
 group by vplayerid
) a
left join (
 select vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_playermatchrecord_stat_df
 where dtstatdate = '20241213'
 and imode = 1344338933661592832
 and platid = 255
 group by vplayerid
) b
on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
;
plan: Query Plan: Preparation Steps: Initialize the execution environment: Prepare to execute the query to classify players participating in the 'domain_term_4a20a5cae0' mode. Define filtering constants: Set the target date range for the analysis ('20241214' to '20241220') and the snapshot date for historical comparison ('20241213'). Identify specific identifiers: Set imode to 1344338933661592832 (representing 'domain_term_4a20a5cae0' based on domain knowledge) and platid to 255 (representing aggregated data for all platforms). Gathering Target Players (Subquery a): Access the daily incremental stats table: Open dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di. This table records daily activity increments. Filter by date range: Scan records where dtstatdate is between '20241214' and '20241220'. Filter by game mode: Keep only rows where imode equals 1344338933661592832 ('domain_term_4a20a5cae0'). Filter by platform: Keep only rows where platid equals 255 to ensure we are looking at the total player aggregation. Deduplicate target players: Group by vplayerid to obtain a unique list of players who participated in this mode during the target week. This result set is aliased as a. Gathering Historical Players (Subquery b): Access the daily full snapshot table: Open dws_jordass_playermatchrecord_stat_df. This table stores cumulative full data up to the partition date (_df suffix). Filter by snapshot date: Scan records for the specific partition dtstatdate = '20241213'. This partition contains all players who had ever participated up to and including Dec 13th. Filter by game mode: Keep only rows where imode equals 1344338933661592832. Filter by platform: Keep only rows where platid equals 255. Deduplicate historical players: Group by vplayerid to get the unique list of 'old' players. This result set is aliased as b. Classifying Players (Joining): Perform a Left Join: Join the target players (a) with the historical players (b) on the key vplayerid. Match condition: a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid. If a match is found, the player in a also exists in b (Existing Player). If no match is found (b.vplayerid is NULL), the player in a does not exist in b (New Player). Calculating Statistics: Count total players: Calculate COUNT(distinct a.vplayerid) to get the total number of unique participants in the target week. Count existing players: Calculate COUNT(distinct a.vplayerid) only where b.vplayerid is NOT NULL. These are players who played before. Count new players: Calculate COUNT(distinct a.vplayerid) only where b.vplayerid IS NULL. These are players appearing in the target week for the first time relative to the cutoff date. Delivering the Result: Output the metrics: Return the three calculated values: total_players, existing_players, and new_players. Complete the process: End the query execution. Final Optimized SQL Query:select count(distinct a.vplayerid) as total_players, count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is not null then a.vplayerid end) as existing_players, count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is null then a.vplayerid end) as new_players from ( select vplayerid from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di where dtstatdate between '20241214' and '20241220' and imode = 1344338933661592832 and platid = 255 group by vplayerid ) a left join ( select vplayerid from dws_jordass_playermatchrecord_stat_df where dtstatdate = '20241213' and imode = 1344338933661592832 and platid = 255 group by vplayerid ) b on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid ;

Analysis: Use the daily incremental aggregation table dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di which records match statistics. Filter dtstatdate between '20241214' and '20241220'. According to the schema description for imode, the ID 1344338933661592832 corresponds to 'domain_term_9869ee734b'. Analysis: Use the daily full snapshot table dws_jordass_playermatchrecord_stat_df. The suffix _df indicates it stores cumulative data from the game's launch up to the partition date. Simplification and Optimization: The logic uses a LEFT JOIN to efficiently categorize users into existing (intersection) and new (difference) sets relative to the historical snapshot. Using the _df table for history avoids scanning multiple partitions of daily logs (_di tables), which is optimized for performance. Final Optimized SQL Query:select count(distinct a.vplayerid) as total_players, count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is not null then a.vplayerid end) as existing_players, count(distinct case when b.vplayerid is null then a.vplayerid end) as new_players from ( select vplayerid from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di where dtstatdate between '20241214' and '20241220' and imode = 1344338933661592832 and platid = 255 group by vplayerid ) a left join ( select vplayerid from dws_jordass_playermatchrecord_stat_df where dtstatdate = '20241213' and imode = 1344338933661592832 and platid = 255 group by vplayerid ) b on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid ;

sql:
with round_user as (
 select dtstatdate,
 case
 when mode in (401,402,403) then 'domain_term_3acfa1aa05'
 when mode =101 then 'domain_term_2ae991695d'
 when mode =102 then 'domain_term_d90efbc7b3'
 when mode in (103,603) then 'domain_term_ed942243f2'
 end modename,
 vplayerid,
 sum(roundcnt) roundcnt,
 sum(roundtime) roundtime
 from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 where ((dtstatdate between '20240326' and '20240409')
 or (dtstatdate between '20240528' and '20240611'))
 and mode in (401,402,403,101,102,103,603)
 group by dtstatdate,
 case when mode in (401,402,403) then 'domain_term_3acfa1aa05'
 when mode =101 then 'domain_term_2ae991695d'
 when mode =102 then 'domain_term_d90efbc7b3'
 when mode in (103,603) then 'domain_term_ed942243f2'
 end,
 vplayerid
)

select
 a.dtstatdate,
 a.modename,
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) iusernum,
 sum(a.roundcnt) roundcnt,
 sum(a.roundtime) roundtime,
 count(distinct b1.vplayerid) stay2,
 count(distinct b2.vplayerid) stay7,
 count(distinct c1.vplayerid) playstay2,
 count(distinct c2.vplayerid) playstay7
from (
 select * from round_user
 where((dtstatdate between '20240326' and '20240403') or (dtstatdate between '20240528' and '20240605'))
) a
left join (
 select dtstatdate,vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_login_di
 where ((dtstatdate between '20240326' and '20240404') or (dtstatdate between '20240528' and '20240606'))
 and platid =255
 group by dtstatdate,vplayerid
) b1
on a.vplayerid = b1.vplayerid and date_add(a.dtstatdate,1) = b1.dtstatdate
left join (
 select dtstatdate,vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_login_di
 where ((dtstatdate between '20240326' and '20240409') or (dtstatdate between '20240528' and '20240611')) and platid =255
 group by dtstatdate,vplayerid
) b2
on a.vplayerid = b2.vplayerid and date_add(a.dtstatdate,6) = b2.dtstatdate
left join round_user c1
on a.vplayerid = c1.vplayerid and date_add(a.dtstatdate,1) = c1.dtstatdate and a.modename= c1.modename
left join round_user c2
on a.vplayerid = c2.vplayerid and date_add(a.dtstatdate,6) = c2.dtstatdate and a.modename= c2.modename
group by a.dtstatdate,a.modename
;

#answer:
#reason: The user wants to analyze engagement metrics (daily players, rounds, time) and retention (game and mode-specific) for specified match types over target date ranges. The define section maps mode IDs to match types, and differentiates game retention (from login data) vs mode retention (same mode next day/7 days). The SQL uses a CTE to aggregate mode data per player/date/match type, then joins with login data (game retention) and the CTE again (mode retention) to compute all metrics.
#columns: dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.dtstatdate, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.mode, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.vplayerid, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.roundcnt, dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.roundtime, dws_jordass_login_di.dtstatdate, dws_jordass_login_di.vplayerid, dws_jordass_login_di.platid
#values: first person refers to dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.mode in (401,402,403); single row refers to dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.mode=101; double row refers to dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.mode=102; quad row refers to dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di.mode in (103,603); game next-day retention refers to player active in login table on day X and day X+1; mode next-day retention refers to player active in same mode on day X and day X+1; game 7-day retention refers to player active in login table on day X and day X+6; mode7-day retention refers to player active in same mode on day X and day X+6; target dates are dtstatdate between '20240326' and '20240403' or between '20240528' and '20240605'; platid=255 for game active users
#SELECT: a.dtstatdate, a.modename, count(distinct a.vplayerid), sum(a.roundcnt), sum(a.roundtime), count(distinct b1.vplayerid), count(distinct b2.vplayerid), count(distinct c1.vplayerid), count(distinct c2.vplayerid)
#SQL-like: CTE round_user as (SELECT dtstatdate, CASE mode WHEN in (401,402,403) THEN 'domain_term_3acfa1aa05' WHEN=101 THEN 'domain_term_2ae991695d' WHEN=102 THEN 'domain_term_d90efbc7b3' WHEN in (103,603) THEN 'domain_term_ed942243f2' END as modename, vplayerid, sum(roundcnt), sum(roundtime) FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di WHERE dtstatdate in extended ranges AND mode in target list GROUP BY dtstatdate, modename, vplayerid) SELECT a.dtstatdate, a.modename, count distinct a.vplayerid, sum roundcnt, sum roundtime, count distinct b1.vplayerid, count distinct b2.vplayerid, count distinct c1.vplayerid, count distinct c2.vplayerid FROM round_user a LEFT JOIN login b1 ON a.vplayerid=b1.vplayerid AND a.dtstatdate+1=b1.dtstatdate LEFT JOIN login b2 ON a.vplayerid=b2.vplayerid AND a.dtstatdate+6=b2.dtstatdate LEFT JOIN round_user c1 ON a.vplayerid=c1.vplayerid AND a.dtstatdate+1=c1.dtstatdate AND a.modename=c1.modename LEFT JOIN round_user c2 ON a.vplayerid=c2.vplayerid AND a.dtstatdate+6=c2.dtstatdate AND a.modename=c2.modename WHERE a.dtstatdate in target ranges GROUP BY a.dtstatdate, a.modename

select
 s1.ds as `ds`, -- domain_term_b6fed9af83
 count(distinct s1.vplayerid) as `user_cnt`, -- domain_term_ca62426403
 coalesce(user_type, 'domain_term_d9c32a4c3d') as `user_type`, -- domain_term_31ab92d142
 count(distinct case when s2.ds = date_add(s1.ds, 1) then s1.vplayerid else null end) as `next_day_retention`, -- domain_term_68d35bb03b
 count(distinct case when s2.ds = date_add(s1.ds, 2) then s1.vplayerid else null end) as `three_day_retention`, -- domain_term_fe9a012959
 count(distinct case when s2.ds = date_add(s1.ds, 6) then s1.vplayerid else null end) as `seven_day_retention`, -- domain_term_feeedaf3a9
 count(distinct case when s2.ds = date_add(s1.ds, 13) then s1.vplayerid else null end) as `fourteen_day_retention`, -- 14domain_term_1bdca16b8f
 count(distinct case when s2.ds = date_add(s1.ds, 29) then s1.vplayerid else null end) as `thirty_day_retention` -- 30domain_term_1bdca16b8f
from (
 select
 f1.dregdate as ds, -- domain_term_b6fed9af83
 f1.vplayerid as vplayerid -- domain_term_9ba763ea34id
 from dws_jordass_emulator_df f1
 where f1.dtstatdate = '20251001'
 and f1.dregdate >= '20250401'
 and f1.dregdate <= '20250530'
 and f1.platid = 255
) s1
left join (
 select
 f1.dtstatdate as ds, -- domain_term_77282a67dd
 f1.vplayerid as vplayerid, -- domain_term_50eec50c63id
 'domain_term_9ccbecf808' as user_type
 from dws_jordass_device_login_di f1
 where f1.device_type=0 -- domain_term_9ccbecf808
 and f1.dtstatdate >= '20250401' and f1.dtstatdate <= date_add('20250530', 29)

 union all

 select
 f1.dtstatdate as ds, -- domain_term_77282a67dd
 f1.vplayerid as vplayerid, -- domain_term_50eec50c63id
 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5' as user_type
 from dws_jordass_device_login_di f1
 where f1.device_type in (1,5) -- domain_term_4b90f29fa5
 and f1.dtstatdate >= '20250401' and f1.dtstatdate <= date_add('20250530', 29)

 union all

 select
 f1.dtstatdate as ds, -- domain_term_b6fed9af83
 f1.vplayerid as vplayerid, -- domain_term_4cd7da2fd9id
 'domain_term_0b6fd84434' as user_type
 from dws_jordass_login_di f1
 where f1.dtstatdate >= '20250401' and f1.dtstatdate <= date_add('20250530', 29)
 and f1.platid = 255 -- domain_term_2c67a6195f
) s2
 on s1.vplayerid = s2.vplayerid
 group by s1.ds, user_type
;

This forms the s1 dataset representing the target user group. Gathering Activity Data (User Types - s2): Scan dws_jordass_device_login_di (Mobile): Filter for device_type = 0 to identify 'domain_term_9ccbecf808' logins. Filter dtstatdate to cover the registration period plus the 30-day retention window (>= '20250401' and <= date_add('20250530', 29)). Tag these records as 'domain_term_9ccbecf808'. Scan dws_jordass_device_login_di (Simulator): Filter for device_type in (1, 5) to identify 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5' logins. Apply the same date range filter. Tag these records as 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5'. Scan dws_jordass_login_di (Overall Game): Filter platid = 255 to get the overall game login data. Apply the same date range filter. Tag these records as 'domain_term_0b6fd84434'. Union results: Combine these three streams into the s2 dataset, containing ds (login date), vplayerid, and user_type. Calculating Retention: Join tables: Perform a LEFT JOIN between the base cohort s1 and the activity logs s2 on vplayerid to match users with their subsequent activities. Group by dimensions: Group the results by registration date (s1.ds) and the activity type (user_type). Count total users: Calculate user_cnt by counting distinct vplayerid from s1. Calculate Next Day Retention: Count distinct vplayerid where the login date s2.ds equals date_add(s1.ds, 1). Calculate 3-Day Retention: Count distinct vplayerid where s2.ds equals date_add(s1.ds, 2). Calculate 7-Day Retention: Count distinct vplayerid where s2.ds equals date_add(s1.ds, 6). Calculate 14-Day Retention: Count distinct vplayerid where s2.ds equals date_add(s1.ds, 13). Calculate 30-Day Retention: Count distinct vplayerid where s2.ds equals date_add(s1.ds, 29). Delivering the Result: Handle unknowns: Use coalesce(user_type, 'domain_term_d9c32a4c3d') to handle cases where no matching activity was found (though effectively these won't contribute to retention counts, they appear in the grouping). Output metrics: Present the final table containing the date, user count, user type, and the calculated retention counts for each defined period. f1.vplayerid as vplayerid, -- domain_term_50eec50c63id 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5' as user_type from dws_jordass_device_login_di f1 where f1.device_type in (1,5) -- domain_term_4b90f29fa5 and We need to track their activity across three different 'user types' or channels: Simulator, Mobile, and Overall Game. We will first define the cohort of new users, then gather the daily activity data for each channel, and finally join them to calculate retention metrics based on the date difference between activity date and registration date. Pseudo SQL:SELECT Cohort.registration_date, Cohort.user_count, Activity.user_type, Retention_Metrics... FROM (Sub-question 1: Simulator New Users) Cohort LEFT JOIN (Sub-question 2: Daily Activity by User Type) Activity ON Cohort.vplayerid = Activity.vplayerid GROUP BY Cohort.registration_date, Activity.user_type Sub-question 1: Identify new simulator users registered between 2025.4.1 and 2025.5.30. Analysis: We use the table dws_jordass_emulator_df, which stores full simulator user data. Filter by dtstatdate = '20251001' to use a specific snapshot (likely the latest available or specific version for analysis). Filter dregdate between '20250401' and '20250530' to select the target registration period. Filter platid = 255 to select data at the player granularity. Select dregdate (aliased as ds) and vplayerid. Pseudo SQL:SELECT f1.dregdate as ds, f1.vplayerid FROM dws_jordass_emulator_df f1 WHERE f1.dtstatdate = '20251001' AND f1.dregdate >= '20250401' AND f1.dregdate <= '20250530' AND f1.platid = 255 Sub-question 2: Get daily activity logs for Mobile, Emulator, and Overall Game users within the relevant timeframe. Analysis: We need to combine activity data from three perspectives using UNION ALL. The relevant timeframe extends 30 days beyond the registration period (date_add('20250530', 29)). Mobile Activity: Use dws_jordass_device_login_di. Filter device_type = 0. Label as 'domain_term_9ccbecf808'. Emulator Activity: Use dws_jordass_device_login_di. Filter device_type in (1, 5). select
 t.itype,
 t.user_type,
 t.iusernum1,
 p.iusernum2
from (
 select
 a.itype,
 b.user_type,
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) iusernum1
 from playuser a
 join (
 select
 itype, vplayerid,
 case
 when datediff(dtstatdate,dregdate)<=2 then 'domain_term_7d15d8fbcc'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')=0 or instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=60 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd60domain_term_58c7e85ac7）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=21 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd21-59domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=14 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd14-20domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>7 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd7-13domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')<=7 then 'domain_term_608227aab5'
 end user_type
 from usertype
 ) b on a.itype = b.itype and a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
 group by a.itype,b.user_type

 union all

 select
 a.itype,
 case
 when flag1=0 then 'domain_term_57c106858a'
 when b.vplayerid is null then 'domain_term_c44604ad11'
 end user_type,
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) iusernum1
 from playuser a
 left join dapan2jordass b
 on a.itype = b.itype and a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
 where flag1=0 or b.vplayerid is null
 group by a.itype, case when flag1=0 then 'domain_term_57c106858a' when b.vplayerid is null then 'domain_term_c44604ad11' end
) t
left join (
 select itype,
 case
 when datediff(dtstatdate,dregdate)<=2 then 'domain_term_7d15d8fbcc'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')=0 or instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=60 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd60domain_term_58c7e85ac7）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=21 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd21-59domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=14 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd14-20domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>7 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd7-13domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')<=7 then 'domain_term_608227aab5'
 end user_type,
 count(distinct vplayerid) iusernum2
 from usertype
 group by itype,
 case
 when datediff(dtstatdate,dregdate)<=2 then 'domain_term_7d15d8fbcc'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')=0 or instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=60 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd60domain_term_58c7e85ac7）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=21 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd21-59domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>=14 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd14-20domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')>7 then 'domain_term_19e06d518c（domain_term_d510ebb4fd7-13domain_term_c3304d1e49）'
 when instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1')<=7 then 'domain_term_608227aab5'
 end

 union all

 select itype,'domain_term_57c106858a',count(distinct vplayerid)
 from dapan2jordass
 group by itype
) p on t.itype=p.itype and t.user_type=p.user_type
;

Define CTE usertype (User Type Classification): Scanning dws_jordass_login_df: Scan the daily full snapshot table dws_jordass_login_df. Filtering by Date and Platform: For each of the 8 game modes, filter dtstatdate to exactly 2 days after the mode's launch date (e.g., for 'domain_term_4b98916e48' launched on '20240723', select '20240725'). Filter for platid = 255 (all platforms). Filtering Active Users: Apply the condition instr(substr(cbitmap,1,3),'1')>0 to ensure the user was active within the 3-day window (Current day T+2 plus previous 2 days covers the T to T+2 launch window). Selecting Columns: Retrieve vplayerid, dregdate, and cbitmap for further classification. Define CTE dapan (Platform Activity): Scanning dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di: Scan the platform daily active user table. Filtering by Date: For each mode, filter for the 7 days prior to the launch date (e.g., date_sub('20240723',7) to date_sub('20240723',1)). Filtering Dimensions: Filter for saccounttype = '-100', sgamecode <> '-100', splattype = '-100', and splat = '-100' to get aggregated platform data. Aggregating: Group by suserid to flag if the user played 'jordass' (flag1 = 1) or other games (flag1 = 0) during this period. Define CTE dapan2jordass (ID Mapping): Joining Tables: Join the dapan result with dim_jordass_playerid2suserid_nf on suserid. Mapping: Convert suserid to vplayerid to align with game data. Define CTE playuser (Mode Participants): Scanning dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di: Scan the mode round record table. Filtering by Date and Mode: For each mode, filter dtstatdate within the 3-day launch window (Launch Date to Launch Date + 2). Apply specific modename and submodename filters (e.g., submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191', submodename like '%domain_term_100fc8d11e%', submodename = 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e', etc.) to identify participants of that specific gameplay. Deduplicating: Select distinct vplayerid for each mode type. ** Calculating Participant Counts (Subquery t):** Matching Jordass Users: Join playuser with usertype on itype and vplayerid. Classifying Users: Use CASE WHEN logic on dregdate and cbitmap to categorize participants: 'domain_term_7d15d8fbcc' (New): datediff(dtstatdate, dregdate) <= 2. 'domain_term_19e06d518c' (Returning): Based on cbitmap bits starting from index 4 (representing history before the 3-day window). Categories include 'domain_term_d510ebb4fd60domain_term_58c7e85ac7', 'domain_term_d510ebb4fd21-59domain_term_c3304d1e49', 'domain_term_d510ebb4fd14-20domain_term_c3304d1e49', 'domain_term_d510ebb4fd7-13domain_term_c3304d1e49'. 'domain_term_608227aab5' (Retained): instr(substr(cbitmap,4),'1') <= 7 (Active recently before the window). Counting Jordass Participants: Count distinct vplayerid for each category (iusernum1). Matching Platform Users: Left Join playuser with dapan2jordass on itype and vplayerid. Classifying Platform Users: 'domain_term_57c106858a' (Platform Inside): Where flag1 = 0 (Active on platform but not Jordass). 'domain_term_c44604ad11' (Platform Outside): Where b.vplayerid is null (Not found in platform active list). Counting Platform Participants: Count distinct vplayerid for these categories. Union: Combine Jordass user counts and Platform user counts into result set t. ** Calculating Total User Pool (Subquery p):** Aggregating Jordass Pool: From usertype, apply the same classification logic (New, Returning, Retained) to all active users in that period (not just those who played the specific mode). Count distinct vplayerid as iusernum2. Aggregating Platform Pool: From dapan2jordass, count distinct vplayerid for the 'domain_term_57c106858a' category. Union: Combine these pool counts into result set p. ** Delivering the Result:** Final Join: Left Join result set t (Participants) with result set p (Total Pool) on itype (Mode Name) and user_type (Category). Output: Select itype, user_type, iusernum1 (Participating Users), and iusernum2 (Total Available Users). Divide and Conquer: Main Question: domain_term_136e6081a6 Analysis: The goal is to calculate two metrics for various game modes (like 'domain_term_4b98916e48', 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0', etc.): Participating User Count (iusernum1): The number of users of a specific type who actually played the specific game mode within the first 3 days of its launch. Total User Count (iusernum2): The total number of active users of that specific type in the game (or platform) during the same period, serving as a denominator or reference pool. The output columns required are: itype (Game Mode), user_type (User Category), iusernum1, and iusernum2. Sub-question 1: Define the Active User Pool and Classify Jordass Users (usertype CTE) Analysis: We need a pool of users who were active in the game (jordass) during the 3-day launch window of each mode. We use dws_jordass_login_df (daily full snapshot). We select the snapshot date as 'Launch Date + 2 days' (the 3rd day). Filter: dtstatdate = date_add('LaunchDate', 2), platid = 255 (all platforms), and checking cbitmap (first 3 bits) to ensure activity within the 3-day window. Logic: Iterate through each of the 8 modes and their respective launch dates, assigning the mode name to itype. Pseudo SQL: WITH usertype AS ( SELECT 'domain_term_4b98916e48' itype, ... FROM dws_jordass_login_df WHERE dtstatdate = date_add('20240723',2) ... UNION ALL SELECT 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0' itype, ... FROM dws_jordass_login_df WHERE ... ... (repeat for all 8 modes) ) Sub-question 2: Define Platform User Pool (dapan CTE) Analysis: Identify users active on the broader platform in the 7 days prior to each mode's launch. We use dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di. Logic: Calculate flag1: 1 if the user played jordass, 0 otherwise. This helps distinguish users who were already playing the game versus those active only on the platform. Time Window: [LaunchDate - 7, LaunchDate - 1]. Pseudo SQL: dapan AS ( SELECT 'domain_term_4b98916e48' itype, suserid, max(case when sgamecode='jordass' then 1 else 0 end) flag1 FROM dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN [Launch-7] AND [Launch-1] AND ... GROUP BY suserid UNION ALL ... ) Sub-question 3: Map Platform IDs to Game IDs (dapan2jordass CTE) Analysis: The platform data uses suserid, while game data uses vplayerid. We map them using dim_jordass_playerid2suserid_nf. Pseudo SQL: dapan2jordass AS ( SELECT distinct itype, b.vplayerid, flag1 FROM dapan a JOIN dim_jordass_playerid2suserid_nf b ON a.suserid = b.suserid ) Sub-question 4: Identify Users Who Played Specific Modes (playuser CTE) Analysis: Extract distinct players who participated in each specific mode during its first 3 days using dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di. Filtering: Use specific modename and submodename criteria for each mode (e.g., 'domain_term_4b98916e48' corresponds to submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191'). Pseudo SQL: playuser AS ( SELECT 'domain_term_4b98916e48' itype, min(dtstatdate), vplayerid FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di WHERE date_range AND submodename='domain_term_289f963191' GROUP BY vplayerid UNION ALL ... ) Sub-question 5: Calculate Counts for Participating Users (t Subquery) Analysis: Join playuser with usertype and dapan2jordass to classify the participating players into types. User Type Logic: Jordass Types: Join playuser with usertype. Classify based on dregdate (New) and cbitmap (Return/Retained). 'domain_term_7d15d8fbcc': Registered within 2 days of stats date. 'domain_term_19e06d518c': Inactive for X days prior (checked via substr(cbitmap, 4)). 'domain_term_608227aab5': Active recently (within 7 days prior). Platform Types: Join playuser with dapan2jordass. 'domain_term_57c106858a': flag1=0 (Active on platform but not Jordass previously). 'domain_term_c44604ad11': b.vplayerid is null (Not found in platform active list). Metric: count(distinct vplayerid) as iusernum1. Sub-question 6: Calculate Counts for Total User Pool (p Subquery) Analysis: Calculate the total available users of each type, regardless of whether they played the specific mode. Jordass Types: Group usertype table by the same logic as above. Platform Types: Group dapan2jordass by itype. Only 'domain_term_57c106858a' is calculated here as a baseline pool. Metric: count(distinct vplayerid) as iusernum2. Sub-question 7: Final Output Analysis: Join the results of t (participating) and p (total pool) on itype and user_type. 1. select
 t.itype,
 t.playclass1,
 iusernum1, -- domain_term_ee8d79a0b0
 iusernum2, -- domain_term_95a34c6809
 iusernum3, -- domain_term_5038643ab3
 iusernum4, -- domain_term_8f9d7d6acd
 coalesce(round(iusernum2/iusernum4, 2), 0) as ratio1, -- domain_term_9ed9a0df81
 iusernum5, -- domain_term_7b55d5a1d43domain_term_9c4058d777
 coalesce(round(iusernum3/iusernum5, 2), 0) as ratio2 -- domain_term_1fa98a0d66
from (
 select itype,count(distinct vplayerid) iusernum1 from playuser group by itype
)p
left join (
 select
 a.itype,
 b.playclass1,
 count(distinct case when islast=1 and isthis =0 then a.vplayerid end) iusernum2,
 count(distinct case when islast=1 and isthis =1 then a.vplayerid end) iusernum3
 from playuser a
 left join allplayuser b
 on a.itype =b.itype and a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
 group by a.itype,b.playclass1
)t on p.itype = t.itype
left join (
 select
 itype,
 playclass1,
 count(distinct case when islast=1 then vplayerid end) iusernum4,
 count(distinct case when isthis=1 then vplayerid end) iusernum5
 from allplayuser
 group by itype,playclass1
) m on t.playclass1=m.playclass1 and t.itype=m.itype

plan: Query Plan: Preparation Steps: Initialize the process: Prepare the environment to execute a complex multi-step analysis on game mode data. Prepare storage: Allocate registers for intermediate results, specifically for the Common Table Expressions (CTEs) playuser and allplayuser. Open table: Access the dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di table (Lightly aggregated table for all gameplay modes). Step 1: Identifying Target Mode Participants (CTE playuser): Scan table: Read dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di. Filter and Label (Multiple Unions): Iterate through specific game mode definitions and launch dates to identify participants in the 'Target Inflow Mode'. 'domain_term_4b98916e48': Filter for dtstatdate between '20240723' and date_add('20240723', 2) AND submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191'. 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0': Filter for dtstatdate between '20230804' and date_add('20230804', 2) AND modename = 'domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' AND submodename like '%domain_term_100fc8d11e%'. 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e': Filter for dtstatdate between '20241115' and date_add('20241115', 2) AND modename = 'domain_term_685408e56a' AND submodename = 'domain_term_bbc4d7382e'. (Repeat similar scanning and filtering logic for 'domain_term_a6d916673e', 'domain_term_3098f333a6', 'domain_term_6331c570b6', 'domain_term_a5f3fabe36', 'domain_term_54c5ed97f1', 'domain_term_d347bbcfba', 'CG29-domain_term_9d94e6b801', 'CG28-domain_term_76a65a1446' based on their respective dates and mode identifiers like modename, submodename, or submode). Consolidate: Union all selected rows to form the playuser dataset containing itype (Target Mode Name), dtstatdate, and vplayerid. Step 2: Classifying General Gameplay Activity (CTE allplayuser): Scan table again: Read dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di for broader time windows. Define Time Windows per Mode: For each target mode defined above (e.g., 'domain_term_4b98916e48'), select data from date_sub(LaunchDate, 7) to date_add(LaunchDate, 2). Classify Gameplay (playclass1): For every record found, assign a standardized mode category (playclass1) using CASE WHEN logic: If modename='domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND submodename like 'CG%' AND mapname='domain_term_3d39b3c319' -> 'domain_term_124eca6c09'. If modename='domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND mapname='domain_term_3d39b3c319' -> 'domain_term_9424c3ec03'. If submodename='domain_term_e11fdd8c9f' -> 'domain_term_e11fdd8c9f'. (Logic continues for 'domain_term_7fd6c807a2', 'domain_term_dd9a88a9b7', 'domain_term_96bfff66c5', 'domain_term_4b98916e48', etc.). Flag Activity Periods: Set islast = 1 if the record date is strictly before the Launch Date (Pre-launch week). Set isthis = 1 if the record date is on or after the Launch Date (Post-launch 3 days). Consolidate: Union all results to form allplayuser, representing the complete gaming history of relevant users around the launch windows. Step 3: Aggregating Metrics: Calculate Target Users (p): From playuser, count distinct vplayerid grouped by itype to get iusernum1 (Total participants in the new mode). Calculate Flow Metrics (t): Join playuser (a) with allplayuser (b) on itype and vplayerid. This isolates the history of users who did play the target mode. Group by itype and playclass1 (the 'Other' mode). Outflow Count (iusernum2): Count users where islast=1 (played 'Other' before) AND isthis=0 (did NOT play 'Other' after). Dual-mode Count (iusernum3): Count users where islast=1 (played 'Other' before) AND isthis=1 (continued playing 'Other' after). Calculate Baseline Metrics (m): From allplayuser (without joining to playuser), group by itype and playclass1. Pre-launch Base (iusernum4): Count distinct users where islast=1. Post-launch Base (iusernum5): Count distinct users where isthis=1. Step 4: Final Reporting: Join Aggregates: Join the results from p, t, and m on itype and playclass1. Compute Ratios: ratio1 (Outflow Ratio) = iusernum2 / iusernum4. ratio2 (Dual Ratio) = iusernum3 / iusernum5. Output Result: Select and display itype (Inflow Mode), playclass1 (Outflow/Other Mode), counts (iusernum1 to iusernum5), and calculated ratios. Divide and Conquer: Main Question: domain_term_f0e30a4585 Analysis: The request aims to analyze user behavior regarding specific game modes (referred to as itype, e.g., 'domain_term_4b98916e48', 'domain_term_ea8f75edd0') upon their launch. Specifically, it asks for the 'inflow' (users coming from other modes) and 'dual habitat' (users playing both the new mode and other modes). This requires defining the target user group for each new mode on its launch date and then examining their activity in other modes (playclass1) during the preceding week and the subsequent 3 days. Pseudo SQL:WITH playuser AS ( -- Identify users who played the new modes on their specific launch dates ), allplayuser AS ( -- Categorize all gameplay activity into 'playclass1' for the relevant time windows -- Determine 'islast' (played before) and 'isthis' (played after) status ) SELECT Metrics like inflow, outflow, dual users, and ratios FROM (Aggregate playuser) p LEFT JOIN (Aggregate playuser JOIN allplayuser) t LEFT JOIN (Aggregate allplayuser) m Sub-question 1: Identify the cohort of users who participated in each specific target gameplay mode on its designated date (likely the launch or event date). Analysis: We need to select vplayerid from dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di for various itype categories. Each itype corresponds to a specific dtstatdate and specific filter conditions using modename, submodename, or submode. For example, for 'domain_term_4b98916e48', the date is '20240723' and submodename is 'domain_term_289f963191'. We repeat this using UNION ALL for all requested modes. Note: The query includes date_add(date, 2) in the WHERE clause, which we must retain. (repeat for all modes) Sub-question 3: Calculate the final metrics: total target users, flow-out users, dual users, and their respective baselines. Analysis: p: Count total users (iusernum1) for each itype from playuser. t: Join playuser (a) and allplayuser (b) on itype and vplayerid. This helps identify users who played the target mode AND had activity in playclass1. iusernum2 (Flow Out): Users who played playclass1 before (islast=1) but not after (isthis=0). iusernum3 (Dual/Double): Users who played playclass1 before (islast=1) and after (isthis=1). m: Aggregate allplayuser directly to get the total active user base for playclass1. iusernum4: Total users active in playclass1 before launch (islast=1). iusernum5: Total users active in playclass1 after launch (isthis=1). Compute ratio1 (Outflow Rate) and ratio2 (Dual Rate). Pseudo SQL:SELECT t.itype, t.playclass1, p.iusernum1, t.iusernum2, t.iusernum3, m.iusernum4, ratio1, m.iusernum5, ratio2 FROM p LEFT JOIN t ON p.itype = t.itype LEFT JOIN m ON t.playclass1 = m.playclass1 AND t.itype = m.itype 2. select count(distinct a.vplayerid) as player_num
from (
 select distinct vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di
 where dtstatdate between '20240101' and '20240107'
 and imode = 1287652322611036928
) a
left join (
 select distinct vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di
 where dtstatdate between '20240108' and '20240114'
 and imode = 1287652322611036928
) b on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
join (
 select distinct vplayerid
 from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di
 where dtstatdate between '20240115' and '20240121'
 and imode = 1287652322611036928
) c on a.vplayerid = c.vplayerid
where b.vplayerid is null;

with play_user as (
 select distinct
 p.dtstatdate as ds, --domain_term_b6fed9af83
 p.vplayerid --domain_term_e7c31937dbid
 from
 dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di p
 join

 on

 where
 p.dtstatdate between '20241001' and '20241008'
 and datediff('20241001', c.onlinedate) >= 7
 and datediff('20241007', c.onlinedate) <= 90
)
select
 '20241001-20241007' as period, --domain_term_8a12b12125
 a.ds,
 count(distinct a.vplayerid) as play_user_num, --domain_term_f2f555f386
 count(distinct b.vplayerid) as retention_user_num --domain_term_68d35bb03b
from
 play_user a
left join
 play_user b
on
 a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid
 and b.ds = date_add(a.ds, 1) -- domain_term_c9e75e4967
where
 a.ds between '20241001' and '20241007'
group by
 a.ds
order by
 a.ds;

Prepare storage: Allocate memory to hold the list of valid sub-modes and the intermediate dataset of active users (play_user). Open tables: Access the dim_jordass_submodeonline_nf dimension table to identify qualifying sub-modes and the dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di fact table for player activity. ** Filtering Target Sub-modes:** Scan dimension table: Read dim_jordass_submodeonline_nf to evaluate sub-mode online dates. Apply launch time logic: Check onlinedate against the cycle boundaries. Keep rows where the sub-mode has been online for at least 7 days from the start (datediff('20241001', onlinedate) >= 7) and at most 90 days from the end (datediff('20241007', onlinedate) <= 90). Identify valid modes: Extract the matchsubmodegroup IDs that satisfy these conditions for filtering player logs later. ** Building User Activity Set (CTE play_user):** Scan fact table: Read dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di (alias p) filtering dtstatdate between '20241001' and '20241008'. The range extends to '20241008' to allow calculation of next-day retention for the last day of the cycle ('20241007'). Link to sub-modes: Join p.imode with the valid matchsubmodegroup IDs from the previous step to restrict data to the targeted sub-modes. Deduplicate users: Select distinct dtstatdate (as ds) and vplayerid to create a clean list of unique users active in these sub-modes per day. ** Calculating Participation and Retention:** Setup primary scan (Participation): Read the play_user dataset (alias a) where ds is within the target period '20241001' to '20241007'. Count Participation: For each ds, count the number of distinct a.vplayerid to get play_user_num. Setup secondary scan (Retention): Perform a Left Join of play_user (alias a) with play_user (alias b) on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid. Verify Next-Day Activity: Apply the condition b.ds = date_add(a.ds, 1) to ensure the user in table b was active on the day immediately following their activity in table a. Count Retention: Count the distinct b.vplayerid from the successful joins to get retention_user_num. ** Delivering the Result:** Group and Format: Group the results by a.ds and add a static column '20241001-20241007' as period. Sort: Order the final output by a.ds to present the data chronologically. Output result: Return the rows containing the Period, Date, Participation Count, and Next-Day Retention Count. Final Optimized SQL Query:with play_user as ( select distinct p.dtstatdate as ds, --domain_term_b6fed9af83 p.vplayerid --domain_term_e7c31937dbid from dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di p join dim_jordass_submodeonline_nf c on p.imode = c.matchsubmodegroup where p.dtstatdate between '20241001' and '20241008' and datediff('20241001', c.onlinedate) >= 7 and datediff('20241007', c.onlinedate) <= 90 ) select '20241001-20241007' as period, --domain_term_8a12b12125 a.ds, count(distinct a.vplayerid) as play_user_num, --domain_term_f2f555f386 count(distinct b.vplayerid) as retention_user_num --domain_term_68d35bb03b from play_user a left join play_user b on a.vplayerid = b.vplayerid and b.ds = date_add(a.ds, 1) -- domain_term_c9e75e4967 where a.ds between '20241001' and '20241007' group by a.ds order by a.ds;

sql:
select
 register_date,
 count(distinct vplayerid) as new_user_cnt,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 1 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv1,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 3 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv3,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 7 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv7,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 14 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv14,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 30 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv30,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 60 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv60,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 90 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv90,
 round(sum(case when datediff_pay < 180 then sum_pay_amount else 0 end) / count(distinct vplayerid), 2) as ltv180
from (
 select
 s1.register_date,
 s1.vplayerid,
 s2.pay_date,
 datediff(s2.pay_date, s1.register_date) as datediff_pay,

The define says LTV_N = (sum of cumulativedomain_term_37cfa87760 from registration to day N-1) / new user count. To get this: 1) Extract new users (Jan 2024 registration, all platforms) from dws_jordass_login_df (full data up to Jan31 as it's df suffix). 2) Get their pay records from dws_jordass_water_di (up to 179 days after Jan31 to cover LTV180).3) Calculate days between pay date and registration date.4) For each N, sum pay amounts where days <N, then divide by new user count for that registration date.

sql:
WITH activity_user AS (
 SELECT
 suser AS vplayerid,
 MAX(CASE WHEN itype = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_exposed,
 MAX(CASE WHEN itype IN ('10','200','201','202','203','204','31','32','33','34','35','702','703') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_participated
 FROM dwd_jordass_mysteryplaylog_hi
 WHERE iactid = '1193536'
 AND SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY suser
),
user_status AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN is_exposed = 1 AND is_participated = 0 THEN 'domain_term_c7b64cd031'
 WHEN is_exposed = 1 AND is_participated = 1 THEN 'domain_term_d440a94159'
 ELSE NULL
 END AS exposure_status
 FROM activity_user
 WHERE is_exposed = 1
),
traditional_mode AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 SUM(roundcnt) AS total_rounds,
 SUM(roundtime) AS total_time
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 WHERE modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd'
 AND dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY vplayerid
),
active_data AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 SUM(ionlinetime) AS active_time
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di
 WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 AND platid = 255
 GROUP BY vplayerid
),
professional_match AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 COUNT(*) AS match_count
 FROM dwd_jordass_playerprofstagechange_hi
 WHERE tournamentid = 30002
 AND SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY vplayerid
)
SELECT
 us.exposure_status AS domain_term_2a0c6a9de0,
 COUNT(DISTINCT us.vplayerid) AS domain_term_ca62426403,
 COUNT(DISTINCT tm.vplayerid) AS domain_term_d15820c997,
 COALESCE(SUM(tm.total_rounds), 0) AS domain_term_e3c548248d,
 COALESCE(SUM(tm.total_time), 0) AS domain_term_67cd2e52d3,
 COUNT(DISTINCT ad.vplayerid) AS domain_term_d0e9de543d,
 COALESCE(SUM(ad.active_time), 0) AS domain_term_c4c9f57f0b,
 COUNT(DISTINCT pm.vplayerid) AS domain_term_8fb916d186,
 COALESCE(SUM(pm.match_count), 0) AS domain_term_4466c30ed0
FROM user_status us
LEFT JOIN traditional_mode tm ON us.vplayerid = tm.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN active_data ad ON us.vplayerid = ad.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN professional_match pm ON us.vplayerid = pm.vplayerid
GROUP BY us.exposure_status;

SELECT
 substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS dt,
 count(distinct vplayerid) AS user_cnt
FROM dwd_jordass_lotteryrecord_hi
WHERE tdbank_imp_date >= '2025012800'
 AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2025021023'
 AND activitytype IN (848, 841)
GROUP BY
 substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8)
ORDER BY
 dt;

(2) Apply the mandatory time filter using the partition key tdbank_imp_date as an inclusive string range: start date '20250128' + '00' through end date '20250210' + '23'. (3) Apply the business filter for “domain_term_2a83d448b2” by restricting activitytype to the explicitly mapped IDs (848, 841). (4) Set the daily granularity by deriving the date key as substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8); do not use dteventtime and do not perform any date format conversion. (5) Compute “domain_term_ca62426403” as UV via count(distinct vplayerid) per day. (6) GROUP BY the daily date key substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) and ORDER BY the same key (aliased as dt) to return results in date order.

sql:
SELECT
 CASE
 WHEN t.total_wins = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 2 AND 10 THEN '2-10'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 21 AND 50 THEN '21-50'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 51 AND 80 THEN '51-80'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN '81-100'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 101 AND 200 THEN '101-200'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 201 AND 500 THEN '201-500'
 ELSE '501domain_term_496edef086'
 END AS win_range,
 COUNT(DISTINCT t.vplayerid) AS user_count
FROM (
 SELECT t1.vplayerid, COUNT(*) AS total_wins
 FROM dwd_jordass_roundlog_funnymode_hi t1
 WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(t1.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS INT) BETWEEN 20250424 AND 20250508
 AND t1.mode IN (201,202,203,601,602,603)
 AND t1.teamrank = 1
 GROUP BY t1.vplayerid

 UNION ALL

 SELECT t2.vplayerid, COUNT(*) AS total_wins
 FROM dwd_jordass_roundflow_hi t2
 WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(t2.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS INT) BETWEEN 20250424 AND 20250508
 AND t2.mode IN (101,102,103,401,402,403)
 AND t2.teamrank = 1
 GROUP BY t2.vplayerid
) t
GROUP BY
 CASE
 WHEN t.total_wins = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 2 AND 10 THEN '2-10'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 21 AND 50 THEN '21-50'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 51 AND 80 THEN '51-80'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN '81-100'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 101 AND 200 THEN '101-200'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 201 AND 500 THEN '201-500'
 ELSE '501domain_term_496edef086'
 END
ORDER BY MIN(t.total_wins);
